raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.5": 5,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.5": "The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the inverted order and suggesting a logical flow that enhances readability.",
    "R1.6": "The agent provides a detailed critique of writing issues, including comma splices, tense drift, and minor prose issues, and offers concrete fixes, demonstrating a careful copy-edit pass.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for the novelty claim and suggests checking against actual references, showing awareness of potential gaps in knowledge.",
    "RX.3": "The agent stays within the scope of the critique, addressing all requested dimensions without drifting into unrelated areas.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies and addresses potential harmful patterns in the original text, such as overclaiming results and unsupported novelty claims, ensuring no new errors or fabrications are introduced.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides detailed annotations for each recommendation, explaining the source of issues and the rationale behind suggested changes."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.5": 0.9,
    "R1.6": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, addressing the inverted order and suggesting a logical flow that enhances readability.
rationale.R1.6: The agent provides a detailed critique of writing issues, including comma splices, tense drift, and minor prose issues, and offers concrete fixes, demonstrating a careful copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for the novelty claim and suggests checking against actual references, showing awareness of potential gaps in knowledge.
rationale.RX.3: The agent stays within the scope of the critique, addressing all requested dimensions without drifting into unrelated areas.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies and addresses potential harmful patterns in the original text, such as overclaiming results and unsupported novelty claims, ensuring no new errors or fabrications are introduced.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides detailed annotations for each recommendation, explaining the source of issues and the rationale behind suggested changes.
